articles.author: Anthony Faiola, Stefano Pitrelli
articles.title: On July Fourth, Pope Leo urges U.S. to welcome, protect and assist immigrants - The Washington Post
articles.description: In Lampedusa, island gateway to Europe, the U.S.-born pope stressed human dignity and told America: « in every generation » immigrants "helped to shape the nation’s character.”
articles.content: LAMPEDUSA, Italy Pope Leo XIV on Saturday defended the dignity of migrants during a visit to the Italian island of Lampedusa, where the Mediterranean waters beckon as a pathway of hope to a better li… [+69 chars]
